sections.paragraph: [Abimael], pr.n. m. of a descendant of Joktan in Arabia, Gen 10:28 1Ch 1:22, probably the father or founder of an Arab tribe called מָאֵל, a trace of which was pointed out by Bochart (Phaleg. ii. 24), in Theophrastus (Hist. Plant. ix. 4), who probably by the name of Μάλι, means the same wandering tribe in the neighbourhood of the modern Mecca, as in Strabo are called Minœi, Μειναῖοι.
